---
description: Import work items / test cases from CSV / XLSX / JSON file into local; never writes to ALM directly
agent: alm

---

# /alm import

> Read a previously-exported file (or human-edited file from QA review) into local `work-items.yaml` + `test-plan/`. **Never writes to ALM directly** — local files stay the source of truth until `/alm push` runs.

## Usage

```
/alm import <artifact> --from <path> [--format auto|csv|xlsx|json] [--mode upsert|create|update] [--map <mapping.yaml>] [--dry-run] [--feature <f>] [--project <name>]
```

`<artifact>`: `work-items` | `tests`

## Flags

| Flag | Default | Effect |
|---|---|---|
| `--from <path>` | required | Input file path |
| `--format auto` | yes | Inferred from file extension; explicit override allowed |
| `--mode upsert` | yes | Insert new + update existing (matched by `localUID`) |
| `--mode create` | no | Fail if any incoming row matches an existing `localUID` |
| `--mode update` | no | Fail if any incoming row has no matching `localUID` |
| `--map <mapping.yaml>` | none | Column-name → local-field map; used when importing third-party-formatted files |
| `--dry-run` | no | Preview merge; **no local writes**; runs the import-review checklist inline |

## Mapping file shape (`<mapping.yaml>`)

When the imported file uses different column names than the canonical export shape:

```yaml
columns:
  "Test Case ID":  localUID
  "Test Name":     title
  "Test Steps":    steps
  "Priority":      priority
  "Owner":         assignedTo
  "Tags":          tags
defaults:
  tier:            L3
  state:           draft
```

## Inputs

- `<path>` — the input file
- `projects/{p}/work-items.yaml` (existing local state for diff)
- `projects/{p}/{agent}/features/{f}/test-plan/**` (existing test plan for diff)
- [`templates/checklists/alm-import-review.checklist.md`](../../templates/checklists/alm-import-review.checklist.md)

## Execution flow

1. Resolve `--format` (when `auto`, infer from extension).
2. Parse the file:
   - CSV: stream rows; split steps cell by `\n`
   - XLSX: read each sheet; cross-reference Cases ↔ Steps via CaseId
   - JSON: parse; validate against `schemas/work-items.v1.json` (for `<artifact>=work-items`)
3. Apply column mapping when `--map` provided.
4. Normalise to canonical local shape (`work-items.yaml` row shape).
5. For each incoming item:
   - Look up by `localUID` in current local state
   - On `--mode create`: fail if found
   - On `--mode update`: fail if not found
   - On `--mode upsert` (default): MERGE (incoming wins on declared fields; existing wins on absent fields)
6. For `<artifact>=tests`: rebuild affected `test-plan/{suite}.suite.md` files with the merged step lists.
7. Validate updated `work-items.yaml` against `schemas/work-items.v1.json`.
8. On `--dry-run`:
   - Run [`templates/checklists/alm-import-review.checklist.md`](../../templates/checklists/alm-import-review.checklist.md) inline
   - Render `alm-reports/import-{ts}.md` showing planned changes
   - **No writes**
9. Otherwise:
   - Write `work-items.yaml` + `test-plan/{suite}.suite.md` files
   - Render `alm-reports/import-{ts}.md`

## Output

- `projects/{p}/work-items.yaml` updated
- `projects/{p}/{agent}/features/{f}/test-plan/**.suite.md` updated
- `projects/{p}/alm-reports/import-{ts}.md`

## NOT done by /alm import

- Does NOT call ALM REST APIs. Local-only mutation.
- Does NOT push results to ALM. Run `/alm push` next.

## Round-trip flow

```
/alm export tests --feature x --format xlsx --to qa-review.xlsx   # send to QA
# QA edits and returns the file
/alm import tests --feature x --from qa-review.xlsx --dry-run     # preview merge
/alm import tests --feature x --from qa-review.xlsx               # update local
/alm push tests --feature x                                       # publish to ALM (smart upsert)
```
